channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [美伊对峙] nan → IRAN : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Toronto, Ontario, Canada)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: nan / IRAN. Location: Toronto, Ontario, Canada. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [美伊对峙] nan → THE US : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Tehran, Tehran, Iran)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: nan / THE US. Location: Tehran, Tehran, Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: IRAN / nan. Location: Iran. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIA → RUSSIAN : Use unconventional violence, not specified below (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use unconventional violence, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIA / RUSSIAN. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Employ aerial weapons. Actors: FIGHTER JET / RUSSIA. Location: Tulcea, Tulcea, Romania. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.
